title: simple-coordinate
description: the simplest plugin to display corrdinates
body:
# [日本語の説明はこちらへ](https://github.com/datsuns/mc-coordinates/blob/v1.4.0_mc1.21.10_supportNeoForge/README.ja.md)

![main screenshot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/datsuns/mc-coordinates/master/image/screenshot.png)

# what is 

Simplest Coordinate plugin.
display current coordinate on HUD.

supported configurations:  
![config screen (en)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a757e5730f98be820de161eb96c31dc486136db_0.webp)
- display position
- text coloring
- detail informasions

# Depends

required followings (Fabric) :
- [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) 
- [Fabric API](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
   - can config display information

required followings (NeoForge) :
- [NeoForge Loader](https://neoforged.net/) 
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
